name: Sarah Chen
notes: Strongly prefers staying 10% under budget. Concerned about hidden renewal costs and termination fees.

name: Marcus Johnson
notes: Needs top-tier reliability and quality. Willing to pay a premium for best-in-class tools and SLA guarantees.

name: Priya Patel
notes: Delivery timeline is critical. Project launch depends on procurement completing within 2 weeks.

name: David Okoro
notes: Must have SOC2 and ISO27001 certifications. No vendor lock-in. Data portability is non-negotiable. Rejects any vendor with critical risk.

name: Elena Rodriguez
notes: Looking for long-term strategic partnerships. Values vendor reliability and brand reputation. Prefers vendors with strong ESG profiles.

name: Tom Mitchell
notes: HIPAA and GDPR compliance required for healthcare data. Zero tolerance for vendors without data portability. Concerned about shadow IT and unauthorized data retention.

name: Lisa Wang
notes: Experienced negotiator. Expects at least 5-10% discount from listed price. Wants transparent contract terms with no hidden fees.
